pricing.refundPolicy: Monthly subscription billing continues until the trader passes, cancels, or changes plan. Trader Career Path includes one free reset at each renewal. Gauntlet Mini does not include free resets.

payouts.schedule: Withdrawals processed once a week on Wednesdays. Request due by 2pm on the prior Friday. $100 minimum net withdrawal. 80/20 profit split in trader's favour. Gauntlet Mini LiveSim payout cap: up to $4,000 after reaching $5,000 profit. TCP LiveSim withdrawal cap: profit target minus 20%. Withdrawal methods assigned by the firm, not optional.

rules.consistencyRule: Consistency requirements apply during evaluation. Progression ladder violations block evaluation for the day but do not automatically require a reset.
rules.notes: Two one-step futures evaluations: Trader Career Path (TCP) and Gauntlet Mini. TCP account sizes: TCP25, TCP50, TCP100. Gauntlet Mini account sizes: GAU50, GAU100, GAU150, GAU200. $400K is part of TCP growth plan, not starting evaluation size. Minimum 10 trading days to pass. Approved trading times only — all positions must be closed by 15:50 CT. No overnight positions. No copytrading in TCP or Gauntlet Mini. EAs not clearly allowed — prohibited-conduct wording warns against software, AI, or ultra-fast data entry that could manipulate trading environment or give unfair advantage. Monthly billing continues until pass or cancellation. TCP includes one free reset at each renewal; Gauntlet Mini does not. Funded accounts: 80/20 profit split, progression ladder, LiveSim EOD drawdown or Live trailing drawdown, daily loss limits (dollar-based, not universal percentage), monthly data fees unless trader has own feed, five consecutive unscheduled trading-day absences result in termination. In 2025, 94.77% of passers traded LiveSim accounts, 5.23% traded Live accounts. LiveSim payout caps apply. Non-professional LiveSim users: no upfront activation fee, one-time $139 fee deducted from first withdrawal if profits are made. Professional users face monthly exchange charges. Futures only — CME, COMEX, NYMEX, CBOT. No ICE, no EUREX. No stocks, options, forex, crypto, or CFDs. Withdrawal methods assigned by firm, not optional. Withdrawal fees: Rise $50 (non-US) or 1.5% (US), Deel $50, Bayzat $5–$40, Direct Crypto 0.735%. 8.89% pass rate in 2025. Evaluations not suggested for people with little trading experience. US and Non-US operations — Non-US run through Bahia Education Services in Dubai for MENA region.

markets.instruments: Futures only — CME, COMEX, NYMEX, CBOT. No ICE, no EUREX. No stocks, options, forex, crypto, or CFDs.

trust.communitySize: 6,400+ traders funded in 2025, 4,500+ live trading accounts

support.hours: Help Centre, support contact pages, customer support commitments
